title: 曼城華埠街坊商會 唔歡迎你班香港人

replies.msg:
唔係個個都鐘意你班香港人過去嫁！特叫係當地華人
你睇下：https://www.facebook.com/McrChinatown/
各位街坊眾和會員:
倫敦已經有一班廢青亂港分子發起集會, 我想遲早都會攪到曼城來.
由其是現在疫情如此嚴重, 不顧他人的安全，他們太自私了.
我想徵求大家的意見, 點樣去應對呢班人. “表示歡迎 或者 不歡迎”
期待您的回覆. 謝謝！
Dear Neighbors and Members
A group of Anti Hong Kong disruptors have launched a protest in London.
I think they will come to Manchester sooner or later.
In particular, the outbreak is so serious, regardless of the safety of others, they are too selfish.
I would like to ask for your opinion on how to deal with these people. "Welcome or not welcome"
Awaiting for your reply.
Thank you! 🙏🙏🙏
https://youtu.be/vCZHLRL2br4
